topic: The doorway to a kitchen grows slightly shorter every morning until the resident must crawl through it.
title: The Doorway Gets Shorter Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I have to duck now to enter my own kitchen, and last month I did not.
scenes.image_prompt: a low kitchen doorway with the top of the frame unusually close to the floor, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is an ordinary kitchen at the end of a short hall.
scenes.image_prompt: a plain kitchen seen through a doorway from a dim hall, counter and sink, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked through that doorway upright for six years.
scenes.image_prompt: a normal height interior doorway in a hallway, soft shadow, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One day my hair brushed the top of the frame.
scenes.image_prompt: the top edge of a door frame very close to head height, faint scuff mark on the wood, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I measured. It was three inches shorter than the others.
scenes.image_prompt: a tape measure held vertically inside a doorway, the number low, dim light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every morning after that it had dropped a little more.
scenes.image_prompt: a doorway noticeably lower than the matching one across the hall, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I taped a pencil line on the frame each night.
scenes.image_prompt: a series of pencil marks descending down the side of a door frame, dim light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every dawn the line had risen. The doorway always shrank by night.
scenes.image_prompt: pencil marks on a door frame with the newest mark far below the others, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now it reaches my waist. I stoop and shuffle through sideways.
scenes.image_prompt: a waist height doorway opening into a dim kitchen, the ceiling beyond seeming normal, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I realized the kitchen on the other side has not shrunk at all.
scenes.image_prompt: a tiny low doorway opening onto a full sized kitchen with high ceilings, impossible scale, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tomorrow I will have to crawl in on my hands and knees.
scenes.image_prompt: a doorway only a foot high at the base of a wall, dark kitchen beyond, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep wondering what will happen the morning the gap is gone, with me still inside.
scenes.image_prompt: an almost fully closed doorway, a thin sliver of dark kitchen visible at the bottom, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
